title: Senior Teacher - IIT Bombay - Growth Opportunity

jsonLd.title: Senior Teacher - IIT Bombay - Growth Opportunity
jsonLd.description:
IIT Bombay, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Senior Teacher for our Agra operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About IIT Bombay:
IIT Bombay is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Maintain classroom discipline and create a positive learning environment
• Participate in teacher training and professional development programs
• Design formative and summative assessments aligned to learning objectives
• Maintain student records and prepare progress reports
• Create curriculum-aligned learning materials and assessments
• Support students with special educational needs
• Utilize technology and digital tools to enhance learning outcomes

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• CA / CMA / CFA certification
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Pedagogy
• Proficiency in Content Creation
• Proficiency in Mentoring
• Proficiency in Child Psychology
• Proficiency in Lesson Planning
• Proficiency in Curriculum Development
• Proficiency in IB Curriculum
• Proficiency in Bloom's Taxonomy

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Professional development and training programs
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Life and accident insurance
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Agra, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with IIT Bombay!
